results.instruction: In the castle, go south for around 11 meters.
Walk south for about 15 meters in the castle.
Head northeast and proceed approximately 7 meters.
Navigate backward until you have moved roughly 11 meters.
Head southeast and proceed approximately 9 meters.
Walk forward for about 11 meters in the castle.
Navigate southwest until you have moved roughly 14 meters.
Go ahead-right approximately 11 meters.
Head south and proceed approximately 9 meters.
In the room, go south for around 2 meters.
In the room, go east for around 3 meters.
Head west and proceed approximately 1 meters.
Head southeast and proceed approximately 2 meters.
In the room, go northwest for around 2 meters.
Walk back and right for about 1 meters in the room.
Head southeast and proceed approximately 2 meters.
Move southeast about 2 meters to reach the goal.
Navigate back and right until you have moved roughly 1 meters.
Go back and right approximately 2 meters.
Move northwest about 2 meters to reach the goal.
